response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience bar with a long, staff-level full-stack career spanning TypeScript/Node.js product work, AI-agent infrastructure including MCP tooling, and demonstrated craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) that align with the role's quality expectations. Cloud (AWS CDK), Kubernetes, Docker, MongoDB, and testing depth are all evidenced. Gaps are stack-specific rather than fundamental: no explicit Nest.js, limited recent React (much frontend history is Ember.js), and Kotlin/Python are not listed, though the polyglot track record suggests fast ramp-up.
strengths: Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js experience at staff/senior level, well beyond the 6+ year requirement
Hands-on AI agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks
Strong engineering culture fit: TDD, testing tooling authorship, CI/CD, DevOps, and knowledge-sharing via workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned anywhere in the resume
React exposure appears limited to one role; most frontend history is Ember.js
Kotlin and Python are absent from the skills list, and significant career time is invested in niche DLang work

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and limited React depth
